description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Make a one-time online donation between $40 and $50 to the featured child hunger program that has the highest number of children fed per $10, paying by card and covering processing fees.

tasks.instruction: Register one adult volunteer for the earliest high-need Saturday meal-packing shift happening next month within 20 miles of ZIP 94103.
